title: BEM-918 worker review
objective:
Create file governance/audit/internal/results/BEM918_WORKER_FULL_WORKING_SYSTEM_ROADMAP_REVIEW.md with content # BEM-918 WORKER FULL WORKING SYSTEM ROADMAP REVIEW
Status: WORKER_REVIEW_READY
Decision: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES
Findings:
- Operator clarification is valid. The next roadmap must be implementation-focused, not conceptual.
- The repository already has a Telegram/Deno entrypoint and Codex contour. The roadmap must reuse this mechanism.
- Existing mechanism confirmed from healthCheck: ai-devops-telegram-curator-webhook, Telegram webhook POST /, autonomy endpoints, gpt-safe-run/status, codex-task/status, codex-runner.yml.
- Claude v1.7 audit findings must be treated as mandatory non-functional requirements: real consumers/runners, independent proof, no stale queue, canonical architecture, event log, GD/DIR prompts.
- The Telegram interface must target General Director: Operator -> Telegram webhook -> EL-CUR-GD-001 -> OBJ-GD-001 -> Director/Worker through managed channel.
- Report delivery must use operator-selected periodicity, default 1 hour, and canonical report format.
- Work must be divided into executable BEM phases with acceptance criteria and proof.
Recommended roadmap phases:
1. BEM-919: repository technical inventory and source-of-truth map for existing Telegram/Deno/Codex implementation.
2. BEM-920: Telegram incoming parser and task envelope schema for existing webhook.
3. BEM-921: Telegram to General Director routing and managed-channel bridge.
4. BEM-922: canonical Telegram reporting pipeline with default 1-hour report configuration.
5. BEM-923: operator-gated production webhook/secrets/schedule decision.
6. BEM-924: deterministic dispatch consumer integration with Telegram-originated tasks.
7. BEM-925: GD/DIR/Worker object runner lifecycle and role reports.
8. BEM-926: CI/Git proof hardening and release-proof manifest.
9. BEM-927: Telegram E2E selftest from command to task completion to Telegram report mock.
10. BEM-928: Claude re-audit package after implementation.
Autonomous scope:
- BEM-919, BEM-920, BEM-921, BEM-922, BEM-924, BEM-925, BEM-926, BEM-927, BEM-928 can be designed and implemented with deterministic code, mock Telegram payloads and workflow_dispatch proof.
Operator gate:
- BEM-923 remains required for real secrets/token changes, production webhook changes, new schedule triggers, always-on daemon choice, issue #31 writes and real pilot choices.
Recommendation:
- Approve roadmap with notes.
- Status: FULL_WORKING_SYSTEM_ROADMAP_APPROVED_WITH_OPERATOR_GATES.
No issue comments.
